name: Favorite French Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl or jar with tight-fitting lid, mix vinegar, sugar and onion.
2. Combine salt, mustard, paprika and 2 tbsp chili sauce to form a paste. Add remaining chili sauce and mix well.
3. Pour into vinegar mixture; add oil and mix or shake well.
4. Store in the refrigerator.
YIELD: about 4 cups
